conditions.message: The governed write surface is local verifier response/transcript artifact writing, bounded by binding checks, locking, and atomic response-file replacement.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2727 inspected RunVerifierSubmit binding checks for current staged payload hash, manifest hash, and condition file hash before writing.
ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2727 inspected mergeVerifierResponse, writeResponsesAtomic, and withFileLock: response updates use a lock file with timeout and temp-file-plus-rename writes.

ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2727 inspected storeSubmitTranscript/readTranscript and found optional local transcript writes under configured/default transcript directories with summary support; no external sends, network calls, migrations, force pushes, resets, or production mutations were added.

conditions.message: Persisted response updates are bound to current response-file hashes, update exactly one condition, preserve atomicity and unrelated conditions, merge supplemental/adjudication deterministically, and write under a lock via temp-file rename.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2728 inspected mergeVerifierResponse and found response-file binding validation, named-condition replacement only, primary replacement preserving existing supplemental/adjudication, deterministic supplemental merge by key with replacement warnings, and writeResponsesAtomic temp file plus os.Rename under withFileLock.

BrightOwl Agent Mail 2728 inspected tests asserting unrelated conditions remain unknown, atomicity message is preserved, stale binding blocks, supplemental/adjudication merge does not change another condition, duplicate supplemental is deterministically replaced, transcript ref is stored, and concurrent writes leave valid JSON.
LilacGlacier staged-slice verification: go test -race ./internal/backpressure -run 'Lock|Concurrent|Submit' -count=1 passed.

conditions.message: The governed security surface is local verifier-response ingestion; staged code rejects unknown stdin fields, enforces packet/file bindings and provenance before writes, and does not add network, API, secret, tenant, or PII handling.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2728 inspected cmd/burpvalve/main.go and found verifier submit stdin decoded with json.Decoder.DisallowUnknownFields and extra JSON rejected unless --transcript - explicitly consumes remaining stdin as transcript bytes.

BrightOwl Agent Mail 2728 inspected binding/provenance/transcript helpers and found writes gated by staged payload, manifest, condition file, and response-file binding checks; transcript storage uses generated hash-prefix/condition filenames under configured transcript dir.
BrightOwl Agent Mail 2728 verified no staged files add external APIs, auth stores, tenant/PII handling, or destructive shell execution surfaces.

conditions.message: No visual surface is governed by this backend/CLI/test payload.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2727 verified staged payload paths are Go backend/CLI/test files only: cmd/burpvalve/main.go, cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go, internal/backpressure/artifacts.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_responses.go, and internal/backpressure/verifier_responses_test.go.

ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2727 inspected the staged diff and found verifier submit command wiring, JSON/robot help text, response ingestion/validation/merge logic, transcript storage, locks, and Go tests; no browser UI, screenshots, CSS/layout, canvas, image assets, or terminal styling/rendering changes.

conditions.message: The new submit path is bounded local file and JSON work, with explicit lock timeout and no unbounded parallelism or external calls.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2727 inspected RunVerifierSubmit and found it builds the existing plan, validates one submitted condition, optionally reads one transcript, and merges one response into one response file.
ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2727 inspected withFileLock and found lock acquisition uses a deadline from lockTimeout, defaulting to 5 seconds, with 10ms sleeps between attempts and no unbounded wait loop.
ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2727 inspected summarizeTranscript and found summary mode caps stored transcript content to the first 20 lines plus a truncation marker.
LilacGlacier staged-slice verification: go test -race ./internal/backpressure -run 'Lock|Concurrent|Submit' -count=1 passed.
LilacGlacier staged-slice verification: go test ./... passed with only the VORCH-05 five-file payload staged.

conditions.message: The payload makes independent verifier evidence explicit instead of self-certifying: it requires separate-context verifier provenance, rejects authorization-only evidence, preserves transcript/audit references, and supports supplemental/adjudication records without weakening primary policy.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2728 inspected validateVerifierProvenance, evidenceOnlyAuthorization, validateSupplementalVerifier, validateAdjudication, VerifierPolicyAllows, and TranscriptRef logic.

BrightOwl Agent Mail 2728 found submit requires verifier kind/model/runtime/separate_context, rejects D7/authorization-only evidence, policy-checks supplemental verifier kind, validates adjudication authority/summary/audit_ref/final_verdict, and records transcript_ref when supplied.

BrightOwl Agent Mail 2728 inspected robot/help contract stating evidence is required, authorization text alone is rejected, supplemental/adjudication merge without rewriting begin atomicity, and duplicate supplementals warn/replace.
